feature: CISO Daily Security Sweep — unsafe-block + secret-pattern + ADR-disk-reconciliation audit

tasks.name: repo_grep unsafe-block sweep: pattern='unsafe' glob='hex-nexus/src/**/*.rs,hex-cli/src/**/*.rs'. Write results to /tmp/unsafe-sweep-<date>.txt
Delta detection: if yesterday's /tmp/unsafe-sweep-<yesterday>.txt exists, diff against today. Surface new unsafe blocks as findings.
repo_grep -P secret patterns: AWS keys (AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}), GCP service-account JSON (@.*\.iam\.gserviceaccount\.com), Anthropic keys (sk-ant-[a-zA-Z0-9-_]{32,}). Write to /tmp/secret-audit-<date>.txt
False-positive filtering: exclude docs/examples/, test fixtures, commented-out patterns. Surface high-confidence leaks only.

cargo audit integration: run dep_audit(severity_min='medium'), parse vulnerability findings (advisory_id, severity, package, version, url), cross-check /tmp/vuln-exceptions.txt (known-accepted vulns), write findings to docs/specs/security-sweep-<date>.md § Dependency Vulnerabilities
repo_grep pattern='ADR-[0-9]{10}' glob='docs/**/*.md' to collect all ADR references. Write to /tmp/ADR-refs-<date>.txt
For each unique ADR-XXXXXXXXXX, attempt repo_read('docs/adrs/ADR-XXXXXXXXXX-*.md'). Log phantom ADRs (grep match, repo_read file-not-found) to /tmp/phantom-adrs-<date>.txt
Cross-check STDB proposed_action table (when stdb_query tool ships) to distinguish 'pending in STDB' vs 'truly phantom'.
Aggregate findings from P0/P1/P2 tmp files. Render as docs/specs/security-sweep-<YYYY-MM-DD>.md with sections: Summary, Unsafe Blocks (delta), Secret Patterns, Phantom ADRs, Recommendations.
Emit structured YAML companion: docs/specs/security-sweep-<YYYY-MM-DD>.yaml with finding_count, severity distribution, actionable_items[] for dashboard ingestion.

phases.name: Daily enqueue via 'hex brain enqueue workplan docs/workplans/wp-ciso-daily-security-sweep.json'

tasks.name: Document enqueue command in docs/runbooks/ciso-daily-sweep.md: 'hex brain enqueue workplan docs/workplans/wp-ciso-daily-security-sweep.json' to run daily at 0800 UTC.
Future integration: when leaking-abstraction reverify reducer ships (CTO parallel investigation), modify P2 to consume it for ADR-vs-implementation drift detection.
